title: Preserve exact budget arithmetic
description: Round-trip plan amounts and reconcile every Budget Position without floating-point drift, omission, or double counting.
target: 100% of conformance examples round-trip Category Budget Entries exactly in ZAR; plan totals equal the exact entry sum; actual totals equal the exact sum of budgeted, Zero Budget, Unbudgeted, and Uncategorized values; Remaining or Over equations reconcile exactly.
load_condition: All supported plan states, including empty, all-zero, refund-heavy, unbudgeted, uncategorized, corrected, and category-lifecycle cases.
measurement: Property tests and fixture-based contract tests compare integer minor-unit or equivalent exact-decimal values and assert all reconciliation equations.
rationale: A plausible but unreconciled position would make BUDGET more dangerous than a manual comparison.
